channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Securitize aims to raise $400 million as tokenization firm nears public debut
item.description: The BlackRock-backed tokenization specialist expects to close its SPAC merger next week and start trading on the NYSE, pending shareholder approval.

item.title: Inside a Sandwich Attack: Lessons From the $7.5 Million Heist Against JaredfromSubway.eth
item.description: Summary JaredfromSubway.eth, the most prolific sandwich-attack bot on Ethereum, was drained of at least $7.5 million in a reverse honeypot… The post Inside a Sandwich Attack: Lessons From the $7.5 Million Heist Against JaredfromSubway.eth …

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Framework Ventures raises $400M to invest beyond crypto: Report
item.description: Framework Ventures raises $400 million fourth fund as it expands into AI, robotics and energy while reportedly planning to continue crypto investments.

item.title: Bitcoin Tests $59K as ETFs Shed $692M, Options Expiry Looms
item.description: Bitcoin fell to around $59,400 as $691 million fled spot ETFs, the most since May, ahead of Friday's $10.6 billion options expiry.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: AAVE jumps 8.9%, leading index higher
item.description: Solana (SOL) gained 4.5%, joining Aave (AAVE) as a top performer.

item.title: Hyperliquid added to Singapore's Investor Alert List
item.description: Singapore’s financial regulator added Hyperliquid to its Investor Alert List, as a reminder that the decentralized exchange was not licensed in the region.

item.title: Wall Street's IPO revival hasn't reached dot-com euphoria levels, Goldman Sachs says
item.description: U.S. IPO issuance has rebounded sharply in 2026, but the bank said the current surge lacks the deal volume and speculative excess that defined the dot-com era.

item.title: BITCOIN BOTTOM? NOT YET Bitcoin has lost over $1.3 trillion in value, but many crypto veterans believe the bottom is still months away. Key indicators point to a potential floor around $50,000-$53,000, with the bear market possibly lasting until September. A - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTFBCQkpsSnJTcFZ3TUxXUndweTNMMlItcGNqOWZXQnQtaEVZeFJ4RHF3d0xweTZmbDVZckQ2cnZoSjFqcjhHWVpuaHJEZTdZZUczY2Fxb3JQQjA4SXB2WHc?oc=5" target="_blank">BITCOIN BOTTOM? NOT YET Bitcoin has los…

item.title: Morning Minute: Kraken Eyes 15% Stake in Aave at $385M Valuation
item.description: Bitcoin sinks to a fresh 2026 low as the selloff drags on. Kraken makes a major move into DeFi. And BlackBerry is staging a comeback.

item.title: Australian regulator extends no-action period for crypto licensing
item.description: Australia’s financial regulator extended temporary enforcement relief for digital asset businesses until Sept. 30 as firms transition into the country’s licensing system.

item.title: RECORD $10.6 BILLION BITCOIN OPTIONS EXPIRY HITS TODAY Today marks the largest quarterly Bitcoin options expiry in history, with roughly $10.6 billion in contracts set to expire. Options expiry is important because traders and market makers often nee - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE12NUh0Nld4djV6ekVHcVNBTmlWVDhyLTlQa1hnWGJjd3lQdHFuU1VuV25rYmJYX3JPRmJoVklUSHdNdnZQYTdQdzROUE5abHRQT3g1bDV5Uk1TVDBqV3RSSFJ1cl8ydw?oc=5" target="_blank">RECORD $10.6 BILLION BITCOIN…

item.title: AscendEX withdrawal complaints mount as ZachXBT questions reserves
item.description: Multiple users reported delayed AscendEX withdrawals after ZachXBT flagged potential liquidity issues and urged the exchange to explain its reserves.

item.title: With crypto ending the first half in the red, bitcoin's solace is it beat Strategy
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 26, 2026

item.title: Bitcoin bounces from $58,000 as derivatives signal more pain in the pipeline
item.description: BTC touched its lowest level since September 2024 before rebounding to $59,770, while ETH slipped further and another $1 billion in futures positions were wiped out.

item.title: All eyes on Strategy's June 30 ex-dividend date and monthly STRC dividend rate reset
item.description: Investors are watching the preferred stock's ex-dividend date and monthly dividend rate reset closely.

item.title: Binance tells EU users it will no longer provide services after failing to secure MiCA license
item.description: A day after withdrawing its MiCA license application in Greece and saying it is ‘not leaving Europe,’ Binance notified users across the European Union that it will suspend some services.

item.title: BitGo Joins Crypto's AI Layoff Wave, Slashing Staff by 15%
item.description: The newly public crypto custodian is slashing nearly 15% of its workforce as it pivots to focus on stablecoins and AI infrastructure.

item.title: Ethereum treasury firm Sharplink buys ether for the first time in eight months
item.description: The second-largest corporate ether holder purchased 5,000 ETH worth about $7.85 million on Thursday, its first inflow since October, even as it sits on a paper loss of roughly $1.8 billion.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs post June's biggest daily outflows as BTC falls below $60K
item.description: US Bitcoin ETFs recorded $696.3 million in outflows as Bitcoin slipped below $60,000, lifting year-to-date losses to $4.6 billion.

item.title: After holding $ETH for 8 years, these #Ethereum OGs finally gave up. Four #Ethereum OG wallets received 37,602 $ETH($58.66M) 8 years ago at ~$830. During the 2021 and 2025 bull markets, their unrealized profit exceeded $150M, but they never sold. Afte - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5pTGZNdHNtbVdJTE94T1Q5eWhIMm1ma21Ob3E4N2toWG5pTDNIZU5zZC1pYko0WnpjZUNtckg3dG5iaWg2VTBfb2dubVM1VWV2TVh5MHlRRXphWkdoMDdjT3l3?oc=5" target="_blank">After holding $ETH for 8 years, th…

item.title: Japanese financial services giant SBI Holdings to buy Bitbank for $289 million
item.description: SBI said the purchase of the crypto exchange is set to close in October.

item.title: It's an interesting day for #Bitcoin. It's option expiry day, which is always a volatile day for the markets (or the days before). More importantly; will $STRC & $MSTR continue to fall? In all honesty, the fact that STRC has seen a relatively big drop yesterday and Bit - x.com

item.title: Grant Cardone says he will keep buying bitcoin using real estate cash flows
item.description: The real estate investor pitched his model as a treasury company backed by cash-flowing property rather than stock sales, framing the slide in bitcoin as a chance to accumulate.

item.title: Polymarket hit by $2.9M theft, users to be refunded
item.description: Polymarket said it contained the compromise and removed the affected dependency after attackers injected a malicious script into its frontend.

item.title: Volatility tests every capital structure. Strategy remains focused on Bitcoin, disciplined capital allocation, credit quality, and long-term value creation. We appreciate our investors and will continue to execute with transparency and resolve. $MSTR - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE5PaFlNTTlUM21adzFRd3gwb0I5WE9sYkV3X3c3VFk0UFB0dW9EMktYUkNvOE5BM3JWaUZWQ3dYdGYwajhQMS12TVhBQnVnNUp3LVVHSFVnSzVjaE0?oc=5" target="_blank">Volatility tests every capital structure. S…

item.title: Here’s a log-scale chart. From a traditional cycle perspective, Bitcoin does not look close to a bottom yet. Risk/reward improves sharply as price approaches investors’ cost basis. Every major cycle has touched realized price. If not, maybe “this time is different.” - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBVOVpUdnNkaUdRYUtzd1FrOHhkOTVVbThxd2JBVWVfWHM2TnE0Y2hrRnUxekxQY3NsRkF5TVdCM3IweEdGaDVTN1c3aGd2MWVZU3lCMTJTdWUyZHVVbTFha0R3?oc=5" target="_blank">Here’s a log-scale chart. From a t…

item.title: Not sure Bitcoin is at the cycle bottom. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFByNmVfUkloYmRVQ1pHSGtTQ2IzeW1zY2hZWlNNX0hJaWpoWXlrOWZrT1V1eGQxbjdyZjZ5bzFtY2ZFSEF6TTd4Y25DTGlObzB2cHB0azNTZ3VUejFKeGlnZkV3?oc=5" target="_blank">Not sure Bitcoin is at the cycle b…

item.title: Too big to fail: Strategy’s $13 billion bitcoin paper loss alone dwarfs hundreds of prominent tokens
item.description: Strategy’s paper loss exceeds the market caps of hundreds of tokens, highlighting the extreme concentration of risk in the crypto market right now.

item.title: FT: Binance to Stop Serving EU Clients Next Week After Failing to Obtain MiCA Licence According to FT, Binance has notified EU clients that it will stop providing services to them from next week after failing to obtain a MiCA licence. From July 1, crypto compan - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1TTk90WmQ2M2ZjNy1kbDNTd1RleTJBS3ptRllLX1ZVVDBUQ01ZYmZVa3U3WTRubFBJSmhvVkhibUxTbjZIY19ZaDBSZzZnSHZqZEJ1bFY5R1FhSlJGb04tZmZqcw?oc=5" target="_blank">FT: Binance to Stop Serving EU C…

item.title: Tether stablecoin flips Ether by market cap as ETH routs to $1.5K
item.description: Ether prices are currently back at crucial long-term support levels last visited in October 2023 and April 2025.

item.title: Ether, XRP and dogecoin lead a broad crypto selloff as tech stocks tumble
item.description: Bitcoin slipped near $58,000 before recovering, and CF Benchmarks says the $50,000 to $60,000 zone is where buyers have always stepped in.

item.title: Coinbase's Base resumes block production after 2-hour outage
item.description: Coinbase's blockchain Base says a consensus problem knocked its network offline for around two hours on Thursday before it returned online.

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin falls below $60,000. Kospi, Nikkei sink
item.description: BTC sees a relief bounce as Asian stocks wilt following sharp losses on Wall Street.

item.title: Sharplink buys ETH after 8-month pause as token hits 2026 low
item.description: In May, Sharplink CEO Joseph Chalom named three catalysts that could push up the price of Ether, some of which have begun to materialize.

item.title: StablecoinX bets on Ethena ecosystem with Nasdaq debut
item.description: USDe circulating supply has shrunk by 70% since the October bull market peak, when it topped $14 billion.

item.title: BitGo cuts 15% of staff to sharpen focus on AI, stablecoins
item.description: BitGo co-founder and CEO Mike Belshe says the layoffs are “a one-time action” and the company doesn’t see the need for further staff reductions.

item.title: Does Botanix’s failure prove Bitcoiners don’t care about DeFi?
item.description: The failure of Botanix suggests that Bitcoiners still prefer Ethereum DeFi to Bitcoin L2s. How can Bitcoin L2s change to win hodlers over?

item.title: Anthropic Urges Congress to Crack Down on AI Distillation By Chinese Rivals
item.description: Anthropic alleged that Alibaba-affiliated operators used nearly 25,000 fraudulent accounts to generate 28.8 million Claude exchanges.

item.title: Bitcoin bounces off new 2026 price lows: Will US stock weakness push BTC lower?
item.description: Bitcoin’s trek into new 2026 lows continued as spot BTC ETF outflows, a bearish monthly options expiry and Strategy’s unrealized losses widened its gap with AI-connected stock returns.

item.title: Polymarket to Refund Users After Scammers Swipe Millions in Website Exploit
item.description: Hackers infiltrated Polymarket’s website via a compromised third-party vendor, the company said, swiping millions in crypto from users.

item.title: Asset management giant Invesco files for tokenized fund targeting stablecoin reserve market
item.description: The $2.5 trillion asset manager deepens its blockchain push after taking over Superstate's tokenized money market fund as fund manager earlier this year.

item.title: Bitcoin options traders hedge downside as uncertainty lingers, Anchorage says
item.description: Anchorage Digital’s latest analysis shows Bitcoin options traders remain defensive as near-term uncertainty persists, though markets are not pricing an extreme downside scenario for Strategy.

item.title: Bitcoin may fall lower but BTC power-law frames crash to $58K as ‘normal’
item.description: Bitcoin’s drop to $58,000 lines up with the power-law model’s cycle lows, even though futures market data points to deeper lows for BTC price.

item.title: SBI Holdings Says $289 Million Bitbank Deal Will Make It Japan's Largest Crypto Exchange
item.description: SBI Holdings has agreed to a nearly $289 million deal to acquire crypto exchange Bitbank, pending regulatory approval.

item.title: Coinbase-Backed Ethereum Network Base Recovers After Block Production Issue
item.description: Ethereum layer-2 network Base was down for more than two hours as it ran into an issue with block production ahead of a planned upgrade.

item.title: Half of UK wealth advisers say clients' crypto is ‘invisible’ to them: CoinShares survey
item.description: A CoinShares survey found than many EU-based wealth management companies had policies that restricted investments in digital assets or provided no guidance on the matter.

item.title: Story Protocol Rebrands as Data Network in AI Training Pivot After IP Token Falls 98%
item.description: Intellectual property network Story Protocol has shifted its focus to a new opportunity in training data for artificial intelligence.

item.title: CoinEx Denies 'Knowledge' of Aiding Sanctioned Iran Crypto Market in $3.8 Billion Disconnect
item.description: TRM Labs said it uncovered over $3.84 billion in crypto flows between CoinEx and a web of more than 60 sanctioned Iranian platforms.

item.title: Coinbase's Base blockchain resumes after two-hour outage disrupted network
item.description: The incident temporarily halted transaction processing on one of Ethereum's largest layer-2 networks.

item.title: 1/ I’ve had a few conversations with people in the crypto community who are becoming worried about Clarity’s progress. Legislation is never guaranteed, but I strongly believe there is a path to get the Clarity Act to the President’s desk. Here’s why: 🧵 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9HNUF1VF9wdTB2UGE3TG9KQmRkZUJGZ1RrQ2pTT2NrSXBQSjlhTzlRMUV1bjhFbGpNNUJoSGVLTHRYS3VGcS1QUlBtRTFob1JHdDltMWFnQ1VTaXpjaUk4MjRGWQ?oc=5" target="_blank">1/ I’ve had a few conversations …

item.title: Bitcoin drop to $58K brings out bears: Is BTC’s next stop below $50K?
item.description: Bitcoin’s crash to $58,000 confirmed a bear flag breakdown, setting a new price target of $54,000 or lower.

item.title: Strategy's yield-generating STRC stock is more correlated with BTC than ever
item.description: The tightening correlation undermines STRC's appeal as a relatively steadier income vehicle.

item.title: AI Took Your Job? California Wants to Know
item.description: California launched the nation's first AI unemployment tracker as policymakers race to determine whether warnings of an AI-driven jobs shakeup are becoming a reality.

item.title: SCOOP: Crypto exchange Kraken is in talks to buy a 15% stake in decentralized finance protocol Aave at a $385 million valuation, according to sources. @willcanny99 reports - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE5UcmpYWFBuRTlPdnFSckNDNGV0VE9BeXVkQlhvbXRRSzhrQTFqdnk2S3RnamZDSFFfY1BEM05HQThzZ2Voc1lJQ2FoakVhMWhGWVZnc2RtUlFhWlFZS2c?oc=5" target="_blank">SCOOP: Crypto exchange Kraken is in tal…

item.title: Kraken in talks to buy 15% stake in DeFi lender Aave at $385 million valuation
item.description: The DeFi lender is rebuilding after the fallout from April's KelpDAO exploit sparked a multibillion-dollar exodus of deposits despite Aave itself not being hacked.

item.title: XRP risks drop below $1, but onchain data highlights silver lining
item.description: XRP’s chance of a daily close below $1 are rising, but whale accumulation and shrinking exchange supply may be a sign that traders are buying.

item.title: JUST IN: Coinbase's 'Base' blockchain has been down for over an hour. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5CYnlKdDhpRDZNSFg1Z2cxT0hNRnFEN19IbGJjQmV0b2JiMUtWLS1rSC1oclF2NlZUTXBUNzQ2ZzV2YlZScHNYczZRYXllcHY5ZkRCazRpU01zX0s3NkxzaEhn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Coinbase's 'Base' blockch…

item.title: a16z-backed crypto firm rebrands, shifts focus to solving AI’s global copyright headache
item.description: The startup formerly known as Story Protocol raised $140 million to secure internet rights and is now building an audit layer for data consent, licensing, and provenance for tech firms.

item.title: 21shares trims 2026 crypto forecasts despite institutional adoption gains
item.description: Asset manager 21shares sees crypto infrastructure advancing faster than prices, as ETFs, stablecoins and prediction markets mature while several 2026 targets slip.
